observed_strengths: PromptVault already assigns deterministic quality scores and gap suggestions to scanned prompts.
The improve command is shared by the Tauri UI and Rust CLI.
Local fallback recommendations are deterministic enough to test without depending on GLM availability.
observed_weaknesses: ImproveResult returned a revised prompt but did not report whether the revision improved the prompt-quality score.
CLI and UI users had to manually compare the selected prompt quality against the recommendation.
The documented future A/B path needed a small local measurement surface before broader prompt-optimizer experiments.

selected_candidate.name: measurable improvement delta
selected_candidate.reason: Expose before/after quality scores, score delta, resolved gaps, and remaining gaps for every prompt recommendation.
selected_candidate.success_metric: The improve CLI JSON output includes quality_delta and a weak prompt smoke reports a positive score_delta with resolved gaps.
